## Safety and privacy impact

- [ ] No new tool, file, browser, shell, desktop, channel, voice, or external-visible action surface.
- [ ] New or changed high-risk behavior remains approval-gated.
- [ ] Secrets are not logged, committed, shown in screenshots, or embedded in fixtures.
- [ ] Retrieved content is treated as untrusted evidence, not instructions.
- [ ] Audit/log/timeline behavior remains visible for the changed surface.
